prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-KCIPHAC-275-ASSRTD-8-NCX Product Type: PERSONAL_PILL_DISPENSER Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Key Chain ID Pill Holder Plastic Coated Interior O Ring Cap (Assorted Colors) Description: Keep medicine pills and IDs safe and organized with the ASR Outdoor Key Chain ID Holder!

The ASR Outdoor Key Chain ID Holder is great for kids, adults and elderly to carry personal and emergency information as well as medicine pills. These key chain containers can be attached to just about any key chain, handbag, jacket or backpack.

The aluminum body and o-ring cap will ensure that contents stay dry during any weather. The plastic coated interior will keep pills from degrading touching the aluminum body. Make sure to keep a few of these around to organize pills, IDs and other important tiny items!

Please note: colors ship at random. If you'd like a specific color, please message us and we will try our best to accommodate you based on availability. Search Terms: pill holder keychain, waterproof pill container, emergency ID capsule, aluminum keychain container, travel pill case, mini waterproof storage, keychain medicine holder, o-ring sealed capsule, small ID holder, portable pill organizer Features: - WATERPROOF & WEATHER-RESISTANT - O-ring seal protects contents from moisture and the elements. - DURABLE ALUMINUM BODY - Lightweight yet strong for long-lasting, everyday use. - PLASTIC-COATED INTERIOR - Keeps pills and small items from touching the metal surface. - PORTABLE KEYCHAIN DESIGN - Easily attaches to keys, bags, backpacks, or jackets. - MULTI-PURPOSE USE - Ideal for storing medicine, emergency ID info, or other small essentials. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
